mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3C1E — Web Portable Reached-Source Drift Reconciliation

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast
import hashlib
import json

root = Path("Z:/FOXAI")
drop = root / "AGENT_FOX_V1A3C1E"
installed = root / "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
checks = [
    (drop / "web_portable_reached_source_drift_reconciliation_v1.py", installed / "web_portable_reached_source_drift_reconciliation_v1.py", "38f32715b955338306b5c467f6d6ad408d63d6612e657a69eacba56da466d8a4"),
    (drop / "WEB_PORTABLE_REACHED_SOURCE_RECONCILIATION_CONTRACT_V1.json", installed / "WEB_PORTABLE_REACHED_SOURCE_RECONCILIATION_CONTRACT_V1.json", "43368accbd4d20560e5c11d3c132c98fd9ff3c84f3f75a1215abdac5352b4b12"),
    (drop / "README_V1A3C1E.md", installed / "README_V1A3C1E.md", "0e3581dca11916224b2d5e102b766c6e35cb51484c49b9afd420ed513a7bcf78"),
]
for source, target, expected in checks:
    assert source.is_file(), source
    assert target.is_file(), target
    assert hashlib.sha256(source.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected
    assert hashlib.sha256(target.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected
text = (installed / "web_portable_reached_source_drift_reconciliation_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(text, str(installed / "web_portable_reached_source_drift_reconciliation_v1.py"), "exec")
tree = ast.parse(text)
imports = set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node, ast.Import):
        imports.update(alias.name.split(".")[0] for alias in node.names)
    elif isinstance(node, ast.ImportFrom) and node.module:
        imports.add(node.module.split(".")[0])
forbidden = {"subprocess", "socket", "urllib", "http", "ftplib", "requests", "pip", "ensurepip", "psutil", "winreg", "ctypes", "webbrowser", "importlib"}
assert not (imports & forbidden), sorted(imports & forbidden)
contract = json.loads((installed / "WEB_PORTABLE_REACHED_SOURCE_RECONCILIATION_CONTRACT_V1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract["mission_id"] == "ENG-20260721-215917-186FD1"
assert contract["protected_context"]["reached_source_count"] == 57
assert contract["protected_context"]["edge_count"] == 165
assert contract["protected_context"]["unresolved_count"] == 1
assert contract["rollback_root_access"] == "read_only"
assert contract["limits"]["maximum_reads_per_source_per_drive"] == 1
assert contract["limits"]["source_buffer_ceiling_bytes"] == 8388608
assert contract["safety"]["rollback_t7_k_modified"] is False
assert contract["safety"]["immutable_evidence_refreshed"] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3C1E_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact V1A-3C1E payloads, syntax, bounded reconciliation contract, and zero forbidden imports
Run bounded classification and Windows-path self-test
Verify immutable evidence, retained diagnostic, exact Web Portable context, and 57-node preliminary closure
Compare all 57 reached sources once per drive and record Z, K, and immutable-evidence reconciliation
Validate exact four-file reconciliation set, 57 classifications, hashes, read ceilings, and zero source-drive writes

argv:
from pathlib import Path, PureWindowsPath
import json

out = Path("Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260721-215917-186FD1_V1A3C1E_WEB_PORTABLE_DRIFT_RECONCILIATION")
report = json.loads((out / "WEB_PORTABLE_REACHED_SOURCE_DRIFT_REPORT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
receipt = json.loads((out / "WEB_PORTABLE_EVIDENCE_RECONCILIATION_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
def norm(value):
    return str(PureWindowsPath(str(value).replace("/", "\\"))).casefold()
assert report["mission_id"] == "ENG-20260721-215917-186FD1"
assert report["closure_counts"] == {"reached_node_count": 57, "edge_count": 165, "unresolved_count": 1}
assert len(report["records"]) == 57
assert norm(report["context"]["launcher_path"]) == norm("Z:/FOXAI/START_FOXAI_WEB_PORTABLE.bat")
assert norm(report["context"]["script_path"]) == norm("Z:/FOXAI/core/foxai_web.py")
assert norm(report["context"]["resolved_interpreter_path"]) == norm("Z:/FOXAI/env/python/python.exe")
core = report["core_init_record"]
assert norm(core["source_path"]) == norm("Z:/FOXAI/core/__init__.py")
assert len(str(core["evidence"]["expected_sha256"])) == 64
assert isinstance(core["evidence"]["expected_size_bytes"], int)
assert core["active"]["is_file"] is True
assert core["rollback"]["is_file"] is True
assert len(str(core["active"]["sha256"])) == 64
assert len(str(core["rollback"]["sha256"])) == 64
assert core["classification"] in {"unchanged", "active-and-rollback-match-but-evidence-stale", "active-differs-from-rollback"}
assert receipt["rollback_write_operations"] == 0
assert receipt["active_source_write_operations"] == 0
assert receipt["maximum_reads_per_source_per_drive"] <= 1
assert receipt["peak_buffer_bytes"] <= 8388608
print(json.dumps({
    "status": "AGENT_FOX_V1A3C1E_EXACT_CORE_INIT_RECONCILED",
    "classification_counts": report["classification_counts"],
    "core_init": {
        "classification": core["classification"],
        "expected_size_bytes": core["evidence"]["expected_size_bytes"],
        "expected_sha256": core["evidence"]["expected_sha256"],
        "active_size_bytes": core["active"]["size_bytes"],
        "active_sha256": core["active"]["sha256"],
        "rollback_size_bytes": core["rollback"]["size_bytes"],
        "rollback_sha256": core["rollback"]["sha256"],
    },
}, sort_keys=True))
validations.name: Verify and print exact core init expected, active, and rollback hashes and sizes
Exercise read-only reached-source drift reconciliation summary query
